title: Adele Visits McLaren Mastercard F1 Team | McLaren Racing
description: Join Adele as she comes for a tour of the McLaren Technology Centre. As part of her visit, she joins Lando Norris for a chat about the rise to success, takes a trip to Zak Brown's office, gives radio a go with Andrea Stella and even jumps in the simulator with Oscar Piastri as her driver coach.

title: Discussing the Science Behind F1’s New Rule Changes (feat. Lewis Hamilton)
description:
​​Scams are a trillion-dollar industry; keep your loved ones safe with Bitdefender: https://bitdefend.me/90-StarTalk

What are the physics of F1? Neil deGrasse Tyson and Gary O’Reilly take a trip down to Miami where they explore the new rules– and new engineering– in F1 racing. We explore the venturi effect, G-forces, and get a visit from Ferrari driver, Lewis Hamilton. Plus, StarTalk tests out the G-forces in our very own hot lap!

Associate Producer — Andrei Puiu

Order Take Me to Your Leader

title: Max Verstappen’s anger at ‘super dangerous’ Red Bull problem explained
description:
Red Bull has a “super dangerous” issue it needs to fix as Max Verstappen gave the team its biggest kicking of 2026 so far at the British Grand Prix. 

00:00 A 'super dangerous' issue 
01:35 Park the 'Macarena' wing? 
03:32 Why Red Bull ignored Verstappen
06:34 Red Bull caught in a trap?
